title: Clean Fuels Pathways Trend Sheet by Players - Q4 2025
content: REG Holds Largest Pathway Footprint Across West Coast Programs; CA LCFS Features the Widest Company Mix Across all West Coast clean-fuel programs, REG (Renewable Energy Group) continues to be the most dominant multi-market participant, holding the highest number of active pathways in CA LCFS, OR CFP, WA CFS, and BC LCFS. REGâ€™s broad renewable diesel and biodiesel portfolio positions it as the single most influential entity across these four markets, with particularly strong presence in OR CFP. Market dynamics vary across programs. CA LCFS remains the most diverse, with pathways spread across a wide mix of companies and fuel types. OR CFPÂ  experienced the fastest growth in new company registrations, driven by biodiesel, ethanol, and renewable diesel additions in 2025 Q1. BC LCFS continues to show steadier participation from a smaller group of dominant players such as Tidewater, DGD, and Montana Renewables
author: Sanyam Malik
